name: Sugarplum Bonbons
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugar together until creamy.
2. Blend in cocoa and almond extract; mix thoroughly.
3. Stir in almonds and oats.
4. Chill dough until stiff, at least 2 or 3 hours.
5. Break off pieces of dough and shape into 1-inch balls.
6. Roll each ball in coconut.
7. Chill before serving.
